content.after:
<template>
    <v-navigation-drawer v-model="localDrawer">
        <v-list>
            <v-list-item prepend-avatar="https://q.qlogo.cn/g?b=qq&nk=1778273540&s=100" subtitle="Tomori@miomoe.cn"
                title="鼠子ゞ"></v-list-item>
        </v-list>

        <v-divider></v-divider>
        <v-list density="compact" nav>
            <v-list-item prepend-icon="mdi-view-dashboard" title="Home" value="home"></v-list-item>
            <v-list-item prepend-icon="mdi-forum" title="About" value="about"></v-list-item>
        </v-list>
    </v-navigation-drawer>
</template>

<script>
export default {
    props: {
        drawer: {
            type: Boolean,
            required: true,
        },
    },
    data() {
        return {
            localDrawer: this.drawer,
        };
    },
    watch: {
        drawer(newVal) {
            this.localDrawer = newVal;
        },
        localDrawer(newVal) {
            this.$emit('update:drawer', newVal);
        },
    },
};
</script>

<template>
  <v-navigation-drawer>

      <v-list-item prepend-icon="mdi-forum" title="About" value="about"></v-list-item>

<template>
    <v-app-bar scroll-behavior="hide" app>
        <template v-slot:prepend>
            <v-app-bar-nav-icon @click="toggleDrawer"></v-app-bar-nav-icon>
        </template>

        <v-app-bar-title>鼠子Blog</v-app-bar-title>

        <template v-slot:append>
            <v-btn icon="mdi-heart"></v-btn>
            <v-btn icon="mdi-magnify"></v-btn>
            <v-btn icon="mdi-dots-vertical"></v-btn>
        </template>
    </v-app-bar>
</template>

<script>
export default {
    data() {
        return {
            drawer: false,
        };
    },
    methods: {
        toggleDrawer() {
            this.drawer = !this.drawer;
            this.$emit('update:drawer', this.drawer);
        },
    },
};
</script>

<template>
    <v-app-bar scroll-behavior="hide" app>
        <template v-slot:prepend>
            <v-app-bar-nav-icon></v-app-bar-nav-icon>
        </template>

        <v-app-bar-title>鼠子Blog</v-app-bar-title>

            <v-btn icon="mdi-magnify"></v-btn>
            <v-btn icon="mdi-dots-vertical"></v-btn>
